TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-frog_aking 2020s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: a rmengoku kingan n nodaan laqi rseno.
S.PHON: a ɾmeŋoku kiŋan n nodaan laqi ɾseno.
S.FORM: a rmengoku kingan n nodaan laqi rseno.
S.PHON: a ɾmeŋoku kiŋan n nodaan laqi ɾseno.
S.TRANSL: 我要講有關一個男孩的故事.
I am going to tell a story about a boy.

S.FORM: laqi rseno nii malu ba lngelunganna.
S.PHON: laqi ɾseno nii malu ba lŋeluŋanna.
S.FORM: laqi rseno nii malu ba lngelunganna.
S.PHON: laqi ɾseno nii malu ba lŋeluŋanna.
S.TRANSL: 這位男孩,他心腸很好.
The boy, he had a kind heart.

S.FORM: dmanga kingan huling ma kingan qpatun.
S.PHON: dmaŋa kiŋan ħuliŋ ma kiŋan qpatun.
S.FORM: dmanga kingan huling ma kingan qpatun.
S.PHON: dmaŋa kiŋan ħuliŋ ma kiŋan qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 他養了一隻狗以及一隻青蛙.
He kept a dog and a frog as pet.

S.FORM: aliali mtaqi we mtheyaq hulingna dahaka qpatunna.
S.PHON: aliali mtaqi we mtħejaq ħuliŋna daħaka qpatunna.
S.FORM: aliali mtaqi we mtheyaq hulingna dahaka qpatunna.
S.PHON: aliali mtaqi we mtħejaq ħuliŋna daħaka qpatunna.
S.TRANSL: 每天,他在睡前都與他的狗和青蛙玩耍.
Everyday, he played with his dog and his frog before going to bed.

S.FORM: ma mqaras riyung ka hulingna duri.
S.PHON: ma mqaɾas ɾijuŋ ka ħuliŋna duɾi.
S.FORM: ma mqaras riyung ka hulingna duri.
S.PHON: ma mqaɾas ɾijuŋ ka ħuliŋna duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗也非常的高興.
His dog was also very happy.

S.FORM: rung qmita qpatun ka laqi rseno ga do qmita siyona ka huling ga duri.
S.PHON: ɾuŋ qmita qpatun ka laqi ɾseno ga do qmita sijona ka ħuliŋ ga duɾi.
S.FORM: rung qmita qpatun ka laqi rseno ga do qmita siyona ka huling ga duri.
S.PHON: ɾuŋ qmita qpatun ka laqi ɾseno ga do qmita sijona ka ħuliŋ ga duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 當男孩看青蛙的時候,狗也看著它.
When the boy looked at the frog, the dog was also looking at it.

S.FORM: eniqan kingan ali keeman mtaqi ma meyah idas uri ma qpatun kndalax a neniqan hiya meyah nganguc.
S.PHON: eniqan kiŋan ali keeman mtaqi ma mejaħ idas uɾi ma qpatun kndalax a neniqan ħija mejaħ ŋaŋuʦ.
S.FORM: eniqan kingan ali keeman mtaqi ma meyah idas uri ma qpatun kndalax a neniqan hiya meyah nganguc.
S.PHON: eniqan kiŋan ali keeman mtaqi ma mejaħ idas uɾi ma qpatun kndalax a neniqan ħija mejaħ ŋaŋuʦ.
S.TRANSL: 有一天晚上,小男孩睡了,月亮也出來了,這時青蛙從牠原來住的地方跑了出來.
One night, as the boy had slept and the moon had also come out, the frog left its resting place and went outside.

S.FORM: dmedax di tutui ka laqi rseno gaga.
S.PHON: dmedax di tutui ka laqi ɾseno gaga.
S.FORM: dmedax di tutui ka laqi rseno gaga.
S.PHON: dmedax di tutui ka laqi ɾseno gaga.
S.TRANSL: 天亮了,小男孩起床了.
At dawn, the boy woke up.

S.FORM: qitaanna ka uN neniqan na q a qpatun hiya ma uka ka qpatun kiya di.
S.PHON: qitaanna ka un neniqan na q a qpatun ħija ma uka ka qpatun kija di.
S.FORM: qitaanna ka uN neniqan na q a qpatun hiya ma uka ka qpatun kiya di.
S.PHON: qitaanna ka un neniqan na q a qpatun ħija ma uka ka qpatun kija di.
S.TRANSL: 他往青蛙原本住的位置看去,但青蛙已經不見了.
He looked towards the place where the frog usually stayed, but it had now disappeared.

S.FORM: naqah ba kuxunna a qmita ka laqi rseno nii.
S.PHON: naqaħ ba kuxunna a qmita ka laqi ɾseno nii.
S.FORM: naqah ba kuxunna a qmita ka laqi rseno nii.
S.PHON: naqaħ ba kuxunna a qmita ka laqi ɾseno nii.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩看到這樣感到很傷心.
The boy felt very sad seeing this.

S.FORM: ma mlukus plukus ye mmaha skadi qpatunna kiya.
S.PHON: ma mlukus plukus je mmaħa skadi qpatunna kija.
S.FORM: ma mlukus plukus ye mmaha skadi qpatunna kiya.
S.PHON: ma mlukus plukus je mmaħa skadi qpatunna kija.
S.TRANSL: 他著裝穿衣準備去尋找那隻青蛙.
He got dressed and set off to find his frog.

S.FORM: ma so ba ima ka hulingna duri ini gdema s dmayo skadi laqi rseno kiya.
S.PHON: ma so ba ima ka ħuliŋna duɾi ini gdema s dmajo skadi laqi ɾseno kija.
S.FORM: ma so ba ima ka hulingna duri ini gdema s dmayo skadi laqi rseno kiya.
S.PHON: ma so ba ima ka ħuliŋna duɾi ini gdema s dmajo skadi laqi ɾseno kija.

TRANSL.notes: 他的狗也沒有閒著,也幫忙尋找(青蛙).

S.TRANSL: 他的狗也沒有閒著,也幫忙尋找 .

TRANSL.notes: His dog did not stay idle, and helped him search (for the frog).

S.TRANSL: His dog did not stay idle, and helped him search .

S.FORM: wada ba inu ka qpatun nii di ha mesa ma posaanna mqiri a truma ka tunuxna a si a neniqanna manu di a qolic k a a qpatun nii peni.
S.PHON: wada ba inu ka qpatun nii di ħa mesa ma posaanna mqiɾi a tɾuma ka tunuxna a si a neniqanna manu di a qoliʦ k a a qpatun nii peni.
S.FORM: wada ba inu ka qpatun nii di ha mesa ma posaanna mqiri a truma ka tunuxna a si a neniqanna manu di a qolic k a a qpatun nii peni.
S.PHON: wada ba inu ka qpatun nii di ħa mesa ma posaanna mqiɾi a tɾuma ka tunuxna a si a neniqanna manu di a qoliʦ k a a qpatun nii peni.
S.TRANSL: 心裡想著:「青蛙倒底去了哪兒呢?」狗將頭探入青蛙的住處.
Thinking "Where did the frog go?", the dog put its head into the frog's resting place.

S.FORM: ma pqeya tunuxna ka tunux na huling ka neniqan na qpatun gaga di.
S.PHON: ma pqeja tunuxna ka tunux na ħuliŋ ka neniqan na qpatun gaga di.
S.FORM: ma pqeya tunuxna ka tunux na huling ka neniqan na qpatun gaga di.
S.PHON: ma pqeja tunuxna ka tunux na ħuliŋ ka neniqan na qpatun gaga di.
S.TRANSL: 但是牠的頭卻因此卡在青蛙的住處裡面了.
But its head got stuck in the frog's resting place.

S.FORM: anina huwa kesaun so mesa uN alixunna ka uh neniqanna liwas a a qpatun nii ma inina inina dehaki mangan so manu di a a liwas nii.
S.PHON: anina ħuwa kesaun so mesa un alixunna ka uħ neniqanna liwas a a qpatun nii ma inina inina deħaki maŋan so manu di a a liwas nii.
S.FORM: anina huwa kesaun so mesa uN alixunna ka uh neniqanna liwas a a qpatun nii ma inina inina dehaki mangan so manu di a a liwas nii.
S.PHON: anina ħuwa kesaun so mesa un alixunna ka uħ neniqanna liwas a a qpatun nii ma inina inina deħaki maŋan so manu di a a liwas nii.
S.TRANSL: 不管他如何使勁地想把那套在他頭上的青蛙的住屋、一個甕、給拿掉,卻怎麼拿不到,也甩不掉.
No matter how hard the dog tried, it was unable to throw off the rat and the frog's resting place, the urn.

S.FORM: ma ini kela ali lmawa qpatun ka laqi rseno nii raguhunna ka baisna quri nganguc lmawa qpatunna.
S.PHON: ma ini kela ali lmawa qpatun ka laqi ɾseno nii ɾaguħunna ka baisna quɾi ŋaŋuʦ lmawa qpatunna.
S.FORM: ma ini kela ali lmawa qpatun ka laqi rseno nii raguhunna ka baisna quri nganguc lmawa qpatunna.
S.PHON: ma ini kela ali lmawa qpatun ka laqi ɾseno nii ɾaguħunna ka baisna quɾi ŋaŋuʦ lmawa qpatunna.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩卻也絲毫未察覺地,推著窗往外呼喊著他的青蛙.
The boy, on the other hand, did not seem to notice what was happening to his dog. He opened the window and called out to his frog.

S.FORM: ma ye naq ini kela ali ye mesa a palixota liwasna ka hulingna gaga ma kndalax a baisna baro takun truma di.
S.PHON: ma je naq ini kela ali je mesa a palixota liwasna ka ħuliŋna gaga ma kndalax a baisna baɾo takun tɾuma di.
S.FORM: ma ye naq ini kela ali ye mesa a palixota liwasna ka hulingna gaga ma kndalax a baisna baro takun truma di.
S.PHON: ma je naq ini kela ali je mesa a palixota liwasna ka ħuliŋna gaga ma kndalax a baisna baɾo takun tɾuma di.
S.TRANSL: 而狗兒也一不小心,只想說擺脫這甕就好了,竟從窗戶上跌了下來.
As the dog was busy taking off the urn from its head, it fell down from the window.

W.TRANSL: 使役-放掉-受焦.非實現=1IPL.主格

S.FORM: wada ba sklui ka? laqi rseno gaga musa nganguc ma osaunna memux ka hulingna.
S.PHON: wada ba sklui ka? laqi ɾseno gaga musa ŋaŋuʦ ma osaunna memux ka ħuliŋna.
S.FORM: wada ba sklui ka? laqi rseno gaga musa nganguc ma osaunna memux ka hulingna.
S.PHON: wada ba sklui ka? laqi ɾseno gaga musa ŋaŋuʦ ma osaunna memux ka ħuliŋna.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩頓時驚訝得往外頭去,把他的狗兒抱著;
The boy was shocked, so he ran out to see if the dog was ok. When he got there, he hugged his dog.

S.FORM: ma mqaras bale ka hulingna uh uh so myeha a qmita heya ka uh huling nii ma cehakunna dqerasna.
S.PHON: ma mqaɾas bale ka ħuliŋna uħ uħ so mjeħa a qmita ħeja ka uħ ħuliŋ nii ma ʦeħakunna dqeɾasna.
S.FORM: ma mqaras bale ka hulingna uh uh so myeha a qmita heya ka uh huling nii ma cehakunna dqerasna.
S.PHON: ma mqaɾas bale ka ħuliŋna uħ uħ so mjeħa a qmita ħeja ka uħ ħuliŋ nii ma ʦeħakunna dqeɾasna.
S.TRANSL: 狗兒卻很開心並感恩地舔著他的臉.
The dog was happy to see him and licked his face.

S.FORM: ma kika mddaha musa skadi yqeyaq hiya ka daha ka laqi rseno nii ka huling nii di moda lmiqu qpatun qpatun si lmawa.
S.PHON: ma kika mddaħa musa skadi jqejaq ħija ka daħa ka laqi ɾseno nii ka ħuliŋ nii di moda lmiqu qpatun qpatun si lmawa.
S.FORM: ma kika mddaha musa skadi yqeyaq hiya ka daha ka laqi rseno nii ka huling nii di moda lmiqu qpatun qpatun si lmawa.
S.PHON: ma kika mddaħa musa skadi jqejaq ħija ka daħa ka laqi ɾseno nii ka ħuliŋ nii di moda lmiqu qpatun qpatun si lmawa.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣,這隻狗兒就和這個小男孩他們倆一起去田間尋找青蛙,走過森林.「青蛙!青蛙!」這樣喊著.
So the boy and the dog set off together to the fields and the forest to find the frog. The boy called, "Frog! Frog!"

S.FORM: ma qitaanna eniqan kingan beling ma mqiri beling kiya ka laqi rseno nii wa qiyucun qolic qtehur ngungu ka muhingna.
S.PHON: ma qitaanna eniqan kiŋan beliŋ ma mqiɾi beliŋ kija ka laqi ɾseno nii wa qijuʦun qoliʦ qteħuɾ ŋuŋu ka muħiŋna.
S.FORM: ma qitaanna eniqan kingan beling ma mqiri beling kiya ka laqi rseno nii wa qiyucun qolic qtehur ngungu ka muhingna.
S.PHON: ma qitaanna eniqan kiŋan beliŋ ma mqiɾi beliŋ kija ka laqi ɾseno nii wa qijuʦun qoliʦ qteħuɾ ŋuŋu ka muħiŋna.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小洞口,小男孩看到了,便將頭往裡探,卻給田鼠咬了他的鼻子.
When they saw a small hole, the boy put his head in to see if the frog was there. Instead of finding the frog, the boy's nose was bit by a field rat.

S.FORM: ma ini kela ali ga skadi a qpatun ka hulingna ga duri.
S.PHON: ma ini kela ali ga skadi a qpatun ka ħuliŋna ga duɾi.
S.FORM: ma ini kela ali ga skadi a qpatun ka hulingna ga duri.
S.PHON: ma ini kela ali ga skadi a qpatun ka ħuliŋna ga duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗兒也很專心地找著青蛙.
His dog also tried hard to find the frog.

S.FORM: osaunna lngelu ka qhuni paru ga inina qitai ka tdiyung a gaga m baro hiya.
S.PHON: osaunna lŋelu ka qħuni paɾu ga inina qitai ka tdijuŋ a gaga m baɾo ħija.
S.FORM: osaunna lngelu ka qhuni paru ga inina qitai ka tdiyung a gaga m baro hiya.
S.PHON: osaunna lŋelu ka qħuni paɾu ga inina qitai ka tdijuŋ a gaga m baɾo ħija.
S.TRANSL: 牠晃動一顆很大的樹,但卻沒發現裡面有虎頭蜂.
It shook a very big tree, but did not realize that it had bees in it.

S.FORM: qpatun qpatun bale sa d skadi qpatun.
S.PHON: qpatun qpatun bale sa d skadi qpatun.
S.FORM: qpatun qpatun bale sa d skadi qpatun.
S.PHON: qpatun qpatun bale sa d skadi qpatun.

TRANSL.notes: 「青蛙,青蛙呀!」(小男孩)這麼說著,尋找著青蛙.

S.TRANSL: 「青蛙,青蛙呀!」 這麼說著,尋找著青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: "Frog! Frog!" (the boy) yelled searching for the frog.

S.TRANSL: "Frog! Frog!" yelled searching for the frog.

S.FORM: ma mdakin qhuni baro ka laqi rseno nii ini kelai tuting a a nrgeruyanna ka rudu tdiyung ka huling nii tmalang sdurakunna tdiyung.
S.PHON: ma mdakin qħuni baɾo ka laqi ɾseno nii ini kelai tutiŋ a a nɾgeɾujanna ka ɾudu tdijuŋ ka ħuliŋ nii tmalaŋ sduɾakunna tdijuŋ.
S.FORM: ma mdakin qhuni baro ka laqi rseno nii ini kelai tuting a a nrgeruyanna ka rudu tdiyung ka huling nii tmalang sdurakunna tdiyung.
S.PHON: ma mdakin qħuni baɾo ka laqi ɾseno nii ini kelai tutiŋ a a nɾgeɾujanna ka ɾudu tdijuŋ ka ħuliŋ nii tmalaŋ sduɾakunna tdijuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 而這個小男孩爬著樹,不知道他的狗兒因搖樹,讓虎頭蜂窩晃落在地正跑著被虎頭蜂追逐.
And the boy climbed the tree, not knowing that his dog was chased by the bees because it shook the tree and made the bee hive fall.

S.FORM: moda s moda berihna laqi a rseno ga ka tdiyung duri tuting kndalax qhuni baro ka laqi rseno.
S.PHON: moda s moda beɾiħna laqi a ɾseno ga ka tdijuŋ duɾi tutiŋ kndalax qħuni baɾo ka laqi ɾseno.
S.FORM: moda s moda berihna laqi a rseno ga ka tdiyung duri tuting kndalax qhuni baro ka laqi rseno.
S.PHON: moda s moda beɾiħna laqi a ɾseno ga ka tdijuŋ duɾi tutiŋ kndalax qħuni baɾo ka laqi ɾseno.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂經過小男孩的前面;而小男孩從樹上掉落在地上.
The bees passed by the boy and the boy fell off the tree to the ground.

S.FORM: sklui qmita ka tuy tyaqung gaga siyo hiya.
S.PHON: sklui qmita ka tuj tjaquŋ gaga sijo ħija.
S.FORM: sklui qmita ka tuy tyaqung gaga siyo hiya.
S.PHON: sklui qmita ka tuj tjaquŋ gaga sijo ħija.
S.TRANSL: 在一旁的烏鴉看得都嚇了一跳.
The crow nearby was shocked seeing this.

S.FORM: ma kedu ba knnarux tunuxmu ha mesa ka laqi rseno dmoi tunuxna ma qmita bale ka tyaqung ssiyo hiya.
S.PHON: ma kedu ba knnaɾux tunuxmu ħa mesa ka laqi ɾseno dmoi tunuxna ma qmita bale ka tjaquŋ ssijo ħija.
S.FORM: ma kedu ba knnarux tunuxmu ha mesa ka laqi rseno dmoi tunuxna ma qmita bale ka tyaqung ssiyo hiya.
S.PHON: ma kedu ba knnaɾux tunuxmu ħa mesa ka laqi ɾseno dmoi tunuxna ma qmita bale ka tjaquŋ ssijo ħija.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩邊摸著自己的頭邊叫著:「我的頭好痛啊!」烏鴉在旁凝視著.
"My head hurts so badly!" said the boy, holdin his own head. The crow was watching nearby.

S.FORM: ma mdakin qho uh btunux baro ma yena seedan so cida ka laqi rseno ga lmawa qpatunna.
S.PHON: ma mdakin qħo uħ btunux baɾo ma jena seedan so ʦida ka laqi ɾseno ga lmawa qpatunna.
S.FORM: ma mdakin qho uh btunux baro ma yena seedan so cida ka laqi rseno ga lmawa qpatunna.
S.PHON: ma mdakin qħo uħ btunux baɾo ma jena seedan so ʦida ka laqi ɾseno ga lmawa qpatunna.
S.TRANSL: 接著,小男孩爬到一顆石頭上面,依附在像是樹枝的東西前,呼喊著他的青蛙.
Then, the boy climbed up to a stone, and leaned against something like a branch, calling out to his frog.

S.FORM: qmita ssiyo ka qbheni duri qpatun qpatun bale si ga lmawa.
S.PHON: qmita ssijo ka qbħeni duɾi qpatun qpatun bale si ga lmawa.
S.FORM: qmita ssiyo ka qbheni duri qpatun qpatun bale si ga lmawa.
S.PHON: qmita ssijo ka qbħeni duɾi qpatun qpatun bale si ga lmawa.
S.TRANSL: 小鳥在一旁看著,小男孩則是「青蛙啊!青蛙!」地呼喊著.
The birds were watching nearby, the boy calling out: "Frog! Frog!"

S.FORM: sklui ka dn dnoina ka so hari ka cida qhuni kiya kela naq rqenux.
S.PHON: sklui ka dn dnoina ka so ħaɾi ka ʦida qħuni kija kela naq ɾqenux.
S.FORM: sklui ka dn dnoina ka so hari ka cida qhuni kiya kela naq rqenux.
S.PHON: sklui ka dn dnoina ka so ħaɾi ka ʦida qħuni kija kela naq ɾqenux.
S.TRANSL: 他依靠著的、扶著的像樹枝狀的東西,原來是隻鹿.
The thing that the boy leaned against was actually the horn of a deer rather than a branch.

S.FORM: sklui ka rqenux tmalang mbahang karina.
S.PHON: sklui ka ɾqenux tmalaŋ mbaħaŋ kaɾina.
S.FORM: sklui ka rqenux tmalang mbahang karina.
S.PHON: sklui ka ɾqenux tmalaŋ mbaħaŋ kaɾina.
S.TRANSL: 這隻鹿聽到小男孩的聲音,便嚇得跑了起來.
The dear was shocked, and started to run, hearing the boy's voice.

S.FORM: ma qmita wa tulusunna rqenuxna ka hulingna smdurik siyona duri tmalang betaq berihna.
S.PHON: ma qmita wa tulusunna ɾqenuxna ka ħuliŋna smduɾik sijona duɾi tmalaŋ betaq beɾiħna.
S.FORM: ma qmita wa tulusunna rqenuxna ka hulingna smdurik siyona duri tmalang betaq berihna.
S.PHON: ma qmita wa tulusunna ɾqenuxna ka ħuliŋna smduɾik sijona duɾi tmalaŋ betaq beɾiħna.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗兒看到他被那鹿兒拖著,也跑在旁邊直奔到他的前方,
The dog saw the deer dragging the boy, so it chased them, and ran to the front.

S.FORM: inina kelai ka kdere berih hiya ma.
S.PHON: inina kelai ka kdeɾe beɾiħ ħija ma.
S.FORM: inina kelai ka kdere berih hiya ma.
S.PHON: inina kelai ka kdeɾe beɾiħ ħija ma.
S.TRANSL: 但牠卻不知道前方就是陡坡.
However, it did not know that there was a steep slope in the front.

S.FORM: wada tuting truma hiya ka laqi rseno ma kana huling sklui mita ka rqenux ssiyo hiya.
S.PHON: wada tutiŋ tɾuma ħija ka laqi ɾseno ma kana ħuliŋ sklui mita ka ɾqenux ssijo ħija.
S.FORM: wada tuting truma hiya ka laqi rseno ma kana huling sklui mita ka rqenux ssiyo hiya.
S.PHON: wada tutiŋ tɾuma ħija ka laqi ɾseno ma kana ħuliŋ sklui mita ka ɾqenux ssijo ħija.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩連同狗兒全都掉落到山崖下去了;旁邊的鹿看著也嚇呆了.
Both the boy and the dog fell off the cliff. The deer, who was watching beside, was shocked.

S.FORM: ma wada tuting yayung truma tuting rcilung ruru hiya.
S.PHON: ma wada tutiŋ jajuŋ tɾuma tutiŋ ɾʦiluŋ ɾuɾu ħija.
S.FORM: ma wada tuting yayung truma tuting rcilung ruru hiya.
S.PHON: ma wada tutiŋ jajuŋ tɾuma tutiŋ ɾʦiluŋ ɾuɾu ħija.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)掉落到河裡,掉落在深的溪裡;

S.TRANSL: 掉落到河裡,掉落在深的溪裡;

TRANSL.notes: (They) fell into the river, which was a deep creek.

S.TRANSL: fell into the river, which was a deep creek.

S.FORM: ma bale tutui wa laqi rseno gaga ma angalunna baro kana ka hulingna.
S.PHON: ma bale tutui wa laqi ɾseno gaga ma aŋalunna baɾo kana ka ħuliŋna.
S.FORM: ma bale tutui wa laqi rseno gaga ma angalunna baro kana ka hulingna.
S.PHON: ma bale tutui wa laqi ɾseno gaga ma aŋalunna baɾo kana ka ħuliŋna.
S.TRANSL: 而那個小男孩竟然還能起來,還將他的狗兒抬起到水面之上.
To one's surprise, the boy was still able to stand up, holding his dog high up.

S.FORM: mqaras bale ma a in a mddaha ini so uh wada so ini so mangan ini hangan luqah.
S.PHON: mqaɾas bale ma a in a mddaħa ini so uħ wada so ini so maŋan ini ħaŋan luqaħ.
S.FORM: mqaras bale ma a in a mddaha ini so uh wada so ini so mangan ini hangan luqah.
S.PHON: mqaɾas bale ma a in a mddaħa ini so uħ wada so ini so maŋan ini ħaŋan luqaħ.
S.TRANSL: 兩個都很開心,也許是因為都沒有受到創傷,
Both of them were very happy, probably because they were not hurt.

S.FORM: ma thuwe a lmanguy musa ruru uh siyo hiya dehuk so qhuni hiya ma.
S.PHON: ma tħuwe a lmaŋuj musa ɾuɾu uħ sijo ħija deħuk so qħuni ħija ma.
S.FORM: ma thuwe a lmanguy musa ruru uh siyo hiya dehuk so qhuni hiya ma.
S.PHON: ma tħuwe a lmaŋuj musa ɾuɾu uħ sijo ħija deħuk so qħuni ħija ma.
S.TRANSL: 接著他們便慢慢地游泳到溪邊的樹頭處.
Then, they swam slowly to one side of the creek where there was a tree.

S.FORM: iya squwaq kesaunna ka hulingna.
S.PHON: ija squwaq kesaunna ka ħuliŋna.
S.FORM: iya squwaq kesaunna ka hulingna.
S.PHON: ija squwaq kesaunna ka ħuliŋna.
S.TRANSL: 「不要說話.」他對著狗兒說.
The boy said to the dog, "Don't speak!"

S.FORM: mddaha mkkaro qhuni baro.
S.PHON: mddaħa mkkaɾo qħuni baɾo.
S.FORM: mddaha mkkaro qhuni baro.
S.PHON: mddaħa mkkaɾo qħuni baɾo.
S.TRANSL: 兩個一起攀爬上了樹頭,
Both of them climbed up a tree.

S.FORM: wana sdiyalun hiya ka qpatunna di wa mddaha ga tuloung ssiyo qpatun hiya.
S.PHON: wana sdijalun ħija ka qpatunna di wa mddaħa ga tulouŋ ssijo qpatun ħija.
S.FORM: wana sdiyalun hiya ka qpatunna di wa mddaha ga tuloung ssiyo qpatun hiya.
S.PHON: wana sdijalun ħija ka qpatunna di wa mddaħa ga tulouŋ ssijo qpatun ħija.
S.TRANSL: 在那裡,他們倆找到了男孩的青蛙.牠就坐在旁邊.
There, they found boy's frog, which was sitting beside.

S.FORM: mqaras bale mita huling dahaka laqi rseno.
S.PHON: mqaɾas bale mita ħuliŋ daħaka laqi ɾseno.
S.FORM: mqaras bale mita huling dahaka laqi rseno.
S.PHON: mqaɾas bale mita ħuliŋ daħaka laqi ɾseno.
S.TRANSL: 狗和小男孩看了都很開心.
Both the dog and the boy was really happy seeing this.

S.FORM: hbaro bale ka kana qpatun gaga s a kana theyaqan hiya.
S.PHON: ħbaɾo bale ka kana qpatun gaga s a kana tħejaqan ħija.
S.FORM: hbaro bale ka kana qpatun gaga s a kana theyaqan hiya.
S.PHON: ħbaɾo bale ka kana qpatun gaga s a kana tħejaqan ħija.
S.TRANSL: 那裏也有很多青蛙的同伴.
Many companion frogs were there, too.

S.FORM: ye kela naq musa skadi dangina mesa ka laqi rseno nii.
S.PHON: je kela naq musa skadi daŋina mesa ka laqi ɾseno nii.
S.FORM: ye kela naq musa skadi dangina mesa ka laqi rseno nii.
S.PHON: je kela naq musa skadi daŋina mesa ka laqi ɾseno nii.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩也許心裡想著:「原來牠是去找朋友了!」
The boy probably thought: "It turns out that he went to look for his friends!"

S.FORM: ma qaras bale duri ini huwa ini huwa snegun naq dangina ye kika tnsapahna ye mesa n mesa ka lngelung ka laqi rseno nii.
S.PHON: ma qaɾas bale duɾi ini ħuwa ini ħuwa snegun naq daŋina je kika tnsapaħna je mesa n mesa ka lŋeluŋ ka laqi ɾseno nii.
S.FORM: ma qaras bale duri ini huwa ini huwa snegun naq dangina ye kika tnsapahna ye mesa n mesa ka lngelung ka laqi rseno nii.
S.PHON: ma qaɾas bale duɾi ini ħuwa ini ħuwa snegun naq daŋina je kika tnsapaħna je mesa n mesa ka lŋeluŋ ka laqi ɾseno nii.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩也很開心,心裡可能就想著:「沒有關係!沒有關係!牠現在跟牠的朋友、或是家人在一起了.」
The boy was happy, too, and probably thought "It's OK! It's OK! It is with his friends, or maybe family, now!"
